nhl.headline: Hilary Knight signs 2-year contract extension with PWHL Detroit
nhl.summary: Five-time Olympian Hilary Knight signed a two-year contract extension with her new PWHL expansion team in Detroit on Thursday in a deal securing her through the 2028-29 season.

nhl.headline: Avalanche continue revamp, trade Valeri Nichushkin to Blue Jackets
nhl.summary: The Avalanche traded longtime winger Valeri Nichushkin to the Blue Jackets on Thursday, continuing to reshape their roster after a playoff disappointment.

nhl.headline: Victoire's Poulin played through torn ACL for Walter Cup win
nhl.summary: Montreal Victoire captain Marie-Philip Poulin revealed Thursday she played through a torn ACL and a torn meniscus in her right knee for the PWHL champtionship.

nhl.headline: Panthers acquire gritty winger Garnet Hathaway from Flyers
nhl.summary: The Florida Panthers ensured they would not lose any of their grit with A.J. Greer expected to depart in free agency by acquiring Garnet Hathaway from the Philadelphia Flyers in a trade Thursday.

nhl.headline: Sabres sign Zach Benson to 7-year, $52.5 million contract
nhl.summary: The Sabres have signed Zach Benson to a seven-year, $52.5 million contract after his breakout playoff performance.

nba.headline: Sources: Mark Williams to return to Suns on 3-year, $38M deal
nba.summary: Restricted free agent Mark Williams intends to sign a three-year, $38 million, fully guaranteed contract to return to the Suns, sources said.

nba.headline: Clippers draft pick Ngoy plans to play at Auburn next season
nba.summary: Narcisse Ngoy, the 57th pick in this week's NBA draft, said Thursday he still plans to play college basketball at Auburn next season.

nba.headline: Micah Nori didn't get 'discouraged' while waiting for HC chance

wnba.summary: The Sky's Courtney Vandersloot, who has been out since tearing her ACL last June, is expected to make her 2026 debut Friday against the Fire, a source told ESPN.

ncaab.summary: Johnson commends the Sooners on their resilient attitude all season as he emphasizes the significance of the fans showing up in Omaha and their impact on the national title win.

ncaab.headline: Joseph Harroz Jr. on OU winning MCWS: 'This is a story of stories'
ncaab.summary: OU President Harroz Jr. gives credit to the Sooners after becoming the 10th team to win three MCWS titles, stating that "we're no Cinderella story, we're the University of Oklahoma".

tennis.headline: Jack Draper wins in latest injury comeback with coach Andy Murray watching
tennis.summary: Jack Draper made an encouraging start to his latest injury comeback by beating lucky loser Marcos Giron in straight sets in the first round of the Lexus Eastbourne Open.

tennis.headline: Francisco Cerundolo beats Tommy Paul to win Queen's title
tennis.summary: Francisco Cerundolo of Argentina beat former champion Tommy Paul to win the Queen's final 6-7 (4), 6-4, 6-3.

tennis.headline: Frances Tiafoe beats Taylor Fritz to win all-American Halle final
tennis.summary: Frances Tiafoe beat fifth-seeded Taylor Fritz 6-4, 6-4 in an all-American final in Halle.

tennis.headline: Musetti withdraws from Wimbledon, opens space for Berrettini
tennis.summary: Lorenzo Musetti has pulled out of Wimbledon as he recovers from a left thigh injury.

f1.headline: Lewis Hamilton dismisses competing for eighth title, aims to 'win' Austrian GP
f1.summary: Lewis Hamilton insists he is not thinking about winning a record eighth world championship -- despite admitting he is making every "sacrifice" possible in order to drive into the history books.

f1.headline: Ferrari capitalize on ADUO, updated power unit for Austrian Grand Prix
f1.summary: Ferrari will run an updated power unit at this weekend's Austrian Grand Prix after making use of an opportunity to upgrade its engine under Formula 1's performance catch-up mechanism, ADUO.

f1.headline: FIA removes term limits, Mohamed Ben Sulayem could stay on
f1.summary: Motor racing's governing body, the FIA, has removed term limits for officials, clearing the way for sitting president Mohamed Ben Sulayem to stay on beyond the previous three-term maximum.

f1.headline: Toto Wolff calls Barcelona GP a 'reality check,' Mercedes aim to bounce back in Austria
f1.summary: Toto Wolff wants Mercedes to produce a response at the Austrian Grand Prix after being handed a "reality check" in Barcelona.

f1.headline: Fernando Alonso shuts down Alpine move, labels Aston Martin negativity 'borderline abuse'
f1.summary: Fernando Alonso has dismissed rumours linking him with a return to Alpine, saying they are another example of how Aston Martin has been treated "very badly" by the outside world and subjected to borderline abuse on social media.

football.headline: Parents allege excessive force in death of ex-NFL player Martin
football.summary: The parents of former All-Pro NFL running back Doug Martin say excessive force by police and delayed medical care led to his death last year, according to a wrongful death lawsuit.
